parsed.availability_comment: 2025 England-duty exit is documented, but no equivalent 2026 absence has been confirmed yet; small schedule/NOC risk remains.
parsed.availability_note: Retained by RCB for IPL 2026; no current March 2026 report of a delayed join or early England recall was found.
parsed.followup_reason: No official pre-opener team sheet or explicit RCB/ECB confirmation of his exact IPL 2026 joining-and-full-season availability window was found.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Strong long-term option, but not an automatic XI lock in a deep overseas group.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes with Phil Salt, Josh Hazlewood, Tim David, Romario Shepherd, Nuwan Thushara, Jacob Duffy and Jordan Cox for overseas slots.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained and highly rated, but RCB still have multiple incumbent overseas starters competing for four slots.
